content.problemStatement:
You are given a string str composed of words and a string word which is a single word. You are
required to calculate the number of occurrences of a string word in the string str, and print the
same.
Note:
If str or word is empty, print -1
If the length of str < length of the word, print -1
Every word in string str is separated by a single space.
A word in string str can be composed of at most 1000 characters.
Input Format:
The input consists of 4 lines:
The first line contains an integer, i.e. the length of string str.
The second line contains the string str which contains the words to be searched separately
by a single space.
The third line contains an integer, i.e. the length of string word
The fourth line contains a string, i.e. word
Input will be read from the STDIN by the candidate
Output Format:
Print the number of occurrences of a word in the string str.
The output will be matched to the candidate's output printed on the STDOUT
Constraints:
0 < length of each string < 10^9
content.inputFormat:
52
abcd efgh ijklmn efgh ijklmn opqrs ijklmn opqrs zxya
6
ijklmn
